steps.title: Spot the specific contrast
steps.content: The notes show that Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn while Cacega Ayuwipi incorporates a Haida gourd rattle. To emphasize this difference between the two compositions, an answer must explicitly state what makes each one distinct.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A — While both compositions integrate various Native musical traditions, *Live On, Heart of My Nation* does so by featuring a Choctaw hymn and *Cacega Ayuwipi* does so by incorporating a Haida gourd rattle. does exactly this: it specifies that Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn and that Cacega Ayuwipi incorporates a Haida gourd rattle.

The other choices either omit these specific details, list hymns and instruments as interchangeable examples without attributing them to particular pieces, or reference “different approaches” without describing them.

That matches Choice A — While both compositions integrate various Native musical traditions, *Live On, Heart of My Nation* does so by featuring a Choctaw hymn and *Cacega Ayuwipi* does so by incorporating a Haida gourd rattle..
